# Transcrição: 11. How to Get Your Share of this Trillion Dollar Industry

- **Fonte:** 11. How to Get Your Share of this Trillion Dollar Industry
- **Duração:** 00:57
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:57]

25% of all salespeople make two contacts and then what do they do? They quit. They quit. They stop. They're like, I'm done. I can't do more than two. It's too much for me. That's a quarter of all salespeople on this planet. It's crazy, man. There's a trillion-dollar industry called sales where business owners are out making deals. You had some dreams, some idea. You wanted to tell people about it. Whether you're in an art studio or you're doing dental implants or you're at a car dealership or you're selling $600,000 homes or you're raising money for some real estate venture or you're a big mortgage broker, 25% of salespeople make two contacts. Never enough to nurture the lead. Never enough to get reciprocated. Never enough to make the client feel obligated. Run out of every four salespeople and businesses that sell products. Call twice and then stop.
